classification.loc_class: QC - Physics: plasma and electromagnetic fields

theory.canonical_statement: ID5161 records ConstrainedDipole GyroscopicPrecession Gyro Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `00_Engine\CSV\TZPID_KDP_batches\TZPID_KDP_batch_0002.csv` for registry alignment and later derivation.

latex_blocks: $ {[}ConstrainedDipole(theta,varphi) * GyroscopicPrecession(omega\_gyro t){]}.",False,,Gyromagnetic Bessel Interference Operator,"The unified propulsion field is defined by the tensor product of a Bessel-function interference pattern and a gyromagnetic field: F(r,theta,varphi,t) = {[}sum\_\{n=0\}\^{}\infty$

$ {[}ConstrainedDipole(theta,varphi) * GyroscopicPrecession(omega\_gyro t){]}.",False,,Gyromagnetic Bessel Interference Operator,"The unified propulsion field is defined by the tensor product of a Bessel-function interference pattern and a gyromagnetic field: F(r,theta,varphi,t) = {[}sum\_\{n=0\}\^{}\infty$
\]
